description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a sleek, modern design, finished in a solid black color. The front face features two horizontal drawer lines, indicating the presence of multiple storage compartments, and the top section appears to have an open shelf or mail slot. The sides are plain and flat, with no visible handles or embellishments, contributing to its minimalist appearance. The back is also unadorned, while the front reveals the functional elements of the cabinet. The cabinet is likely constructed from metal, providing durability and a hard, smooth surface. This type of cabinet is commonly used for organizing documents or files in professional or urban environments.
description: A tall, black, modern filing cabinet with two drawers and an open top shelf, featuring a minimalist design and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat black surface with no visible features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two horizontal drawer lines and an open top shelf, indicating storage compartments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a plain, featureless black surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open structure of the top shelf and the interior of the drawers, with no decorative elements.
